title: Evangelion fact or Evangelion fiction
wikitext:
[]: Evangelion fact? or Evangelion fiction?             Quote Post by Olin of Xephon » Tue Aug 31, 2004 1:51 pm The 'First Impact' thread got me thinking. (as usual ) How much of the science in Evangelion is real and how much is easily disprovable? My major hang up is with the Evangelions. Cloning is a non issue, we all know it's possible, just not how much use it could be, what I wonder is, if you did have a Evangelion body, could it be possible to (re?) animate it? Does anybody here have alittle more knowledge, or theories, about exactly how the Evangelion works, what puts it under the control of NERV and how? And the the functions of the entry plug for that matter. I understand the use of the A-10 Nerve but it's all very vauge, can anybody come up with a conceviable reason for how the children synchronize and what kind of technology or genetic research went into it? In short, can anybody come up with a scientific, plausable, Evangelion? Yeah, yeah, I know there is a lot more fiction then science in Evangelion but I'm curious.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Tue Aug 31, 2004 2:02 pm The scientific concepts and theories are at times as misconstrued as the religious ones. For example, take the following bit from the Viz edition of Eva Manga Volume 5, in the Secrets of Evangelion section: Positrons: One type of anitmatter particle; the first variety of antimatter ever created in the laboratory. Although postulated by noted 20th century physicist Paul Dirac as early as the 1930s, their manufacture, even in ultra-minute qualitites, was not realized until the 1970s, when the breakthrough ocurred at the giant accelerator spanning the Franco-Swiss border of CERN, the Consell Europeen pour la Recherche Nucleaire (European Organization for Nuclear Research). Positrons are the antimatter counterpart to the electrons that suround the nuclei of ordinary matter. Their potential as a weapon is clear when one realizes that while even the most efficient nuclear bombs only manage to release a small percentage of the energy contained in their explosive mass, the intersection of matter and antimatter results in the total conversion to energy of both--a 200% efficient reaction. The late Joe Bankhead, former USNS Electronics Tech 1st Class/Reactor Operator, commented upon the positron cannon employed by NERV against Angel Ramiel. Bankhead noted that while a stream of positrons might be a practical weapon in the vacuum of space, where normal matter in the path of the beam would be tenuous, a positron beam used in Earth's atmosphere would be "the equivalent of putting the barrel of your grenade launcher right up against a wall and then pulling the trigger... The matter/antimatter reaction, in other words, would start to occur within nanometers once the positrons leave the (presumed) magnetic containment field within the barrel. Boom." Bankhead added that in theory this could be prevented by surrounding the positron beam with some kind of generated neutrinos, but that in his judgement it remained "a highly dubious propect."

[]:             Quote Post by sadsadshinji » Fri Sep 17, 2004 10:27 am ummm...there actually is a fluid called ACSF (artificial cerebral spinal fluid) which could be like lcl...but its not orange and stuff... as for the rest, if the eva was living there would be no problem of it moving, especially if it was designed to be able to sustain itself... and the positron cannon is possible...just really hard to do... as for the pallette rifle, think automatic artillery...

[]:             Quote Post by Dark FireStar » Fri Sep 17, 2004 3:56 pm Think of eva's as humans(which they are), we dont truly yet under stand how we work or how we are able to live. It baffels me every day how complex humans are and strange they are to other creatures. i dont think this will answer any questions and will probilty add more but yeah

[]:             Quote Post by ChronoX » Fri Sep 17, 2004 8:54 pm regarding the a10 nerve if one chooses to build an eva and they wanted to connect the human pilot directly to the brain of the eva they would have to do a mix of Homeworld/matrix technoligies. a removable data shunt would have to be implanted to the brain of the pilot and there would have to be a cord to be placed in the data shunt coupling as to the LCL, it is also called the water of life and who knows what kind of properties it may have to allow anyone to link with anything. as to the evangelion itself, design the eva so that it can be born conventually and then grow at a tremendous rate to become full size and implant the macinations into its body and there you have it, a real eva to kick some ass

[]:             Quote Post by Kiel » Fri Sep 17, 2004 10:23 pm Evas, from Adam (or Lilith, depending), are very much alike to homo sapiens (and Angels for that matter). Being living beings controlled by synchronized thought patterns of pilots, It's very possible for reanimation on the theoretic level. ...and for an extra fifty cents, I'll talk out my ass with even more vigour! I haven't got a clue...but it merits futher thought. Meditate on this, I will...

[]:             Quote Post by Karma Burn » Sat Sep 18, 2004 8:19 am regarding the a10 nerve if one chooses to build an eva and they wanted to connect the human pilot directly to the brain of the eva they would have to do a mix of Homeworld/matrix technoligies. a removable data shunt would have to be implanted to the brain of the pilot and there would have to be a cord to be placed in the data shunt coupling

[]:             Quote Post by ChronoX » Sat Sep 18, 2004 12:11 pm i am trying to talk realistically, not like we live in an anime (how i wish we did) how the hair clips, plugsuit and the entry plug itself work in the anime, i don't thing anno wanted to take it as far as to explain how those things work let alone how an EVA would work. nor do i pretend to know how they work (i wish i knew that too) i am just putting in my theories on how they would work in real life just like olin of Zephon asked

[]: You got it.             Quote Post by Olin of Xephon » Thu Oct 14, 2004 10:40 am I'm with ChronoX but any and all speculation is welcome.

[]:             Quote Post by ChronoX » Thu Oct 14, 2004 1:20 pm i just had several thoughts, how is Rei cloned from lith and Yui?? how do the Evangelions regenerate?? and how in the world do they try to get Shinji out of the soul of unit 1?? think on these, we must

[]:             Quote Post by sadsadshinji » Thu Oct 14, 2004 5:25 pm the hair clips are basically neural implants? that have been downsized...and help transfer data to the plug, which, (probably through the command chair) sends the signals to the eva's brain. the plug suits would be one-time use material that would shrink when some chemical was released upon the pressing of the button... Rei is lillith in yui's body evas regenerate just like humans do...except in an environment (lcl or whatever they are placed in) that encourages regeneration much more...

[]:             Quote Post by Dark FireStar » Thu Oct 14, 2004 6:23 pm sadsadshinji wrote: the hair clips are basically neural implants? that have been downsized...and help transfer data to the plug, which, (probably through the command chair) sends the signals to the eva's brain. the plug suits would be one-time use material that would shrink when some chemical was released upon the pressing of the button... Rei is lillith in yui's body evas regenerate just like humans do...except in an environment (lcl or whatever they are placed in) that encourages regeneration much more...

[]:             Quote Post by ChronoX » Thu Oct 14, 2004 8:06 pm i get the Rei is lith in yui's body but how???? yui is long gone and how would they mix their genes into one body??

[]:             Quote Post by sadsadshinji » Thu Oct 14, 2004 9:14 pm its yui's body and lillith's soul... its easy to clone a body really... and kind of a boring procedure if you really want to know... Rei is simply a yui-shaped container for lillith

[]:             Quote Post by MAGI » Thu Oct 14, 2004 9:45 pm That should be the right nail you've hit. 8) i am trying to talk realistically, not like we live in an anime (how i wish we did) how the hair clips, plugsuit and the entry plug itself work in the anime, i don't thing anno wanted to take it as far as to explain how those things work let alone how an EVA would work. nor do i pretend to know how they work (i wish i knew that too) i am just putting in my theories on how they would work in real life just like olin of Zephon asked

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Oct 15, 2004 2:17 am MAGI wrote: Really, I think the concepts in the anime already works in real life. It's just a matter of getting Anno to get into a bit more detail in them. :)

[]:             Quote Post by Cogboy » Fri Oct 15, 2004 5:13 am how does unit 01 operate without any power? i have forgotten the fancy scientific word for this so i can't look as cool as all of you, but basicly the body eats itself for energy. however this phenomenon only occurs under extreme stress, so it is impractical and dangerous to use as a main source of power. more speculation at a later date.....

[]:             Quote Post by MAGI » Fri Oct 15, 2004 8:40 am Reichu wrote: MAGI wrote: Really, I think the concepts in the anime already works in real life. It's just a matter of getting Anno to get into a bit more detail in them. :)

[]:             Quote Post by sadsadshinji » Fri Oct 15, 2004 10:22 am the S2 engine operates by directly converting mass into energy (see the first impact post to see the equation) but if we were to use E = mc^2, you can see that very little mass would produce a heck of a lot of energy

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Oct 15, 2004 11:13 am Cogboy wrote: how does unit 01 operate without any power? i have forgotten the fancy scientific word for this so i can't look as cool as all of you, but basicly the body eats itself for energy. however this phenomenon only occurs under extreme stress, so it is impractical and dangerous to use as a main source of power.
